mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 6.0 percent indicates persistent labor market slack that suppresses corporate earnings growth, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts confirm broad-based consumer demand expansion, producing positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive SPX direction with accuracy > 55% over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A positive month-over-month change in the index of industrial production signals immediate supply-side momentum that translates into positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO momentum yields negative SPX 5-day returns in > 50% of observations during high-growth periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly inflation print exceeding 0.25 percent triggers expectations of central bank policy normalization, compressing equity valuations and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Inflation prints above 0.25% are followed by positive SPX returns in > 65% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent monthly payroll growth above 200 thousand and a declining unemployment rate confirm robust labor market tightening, supporting positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS-UNRATE signal fails to achieve a rank IC above 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarter-over-quarter real GDP growth reflects underlying economic expansion that sustains corporate profit margins, generating positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth is followed by negative SPX 5-day returns in > 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: An industrial production index falling below the 2017 baseline of 100.0 signals a supply-side contraction that reduces corporate revenue expectations, driving negative monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO values below 100.0 are followed by positive SPX returns in > 60% of triggered instances.
